shows.name: The Builder's Frequency
shows.description: Insights for builders creating while employed

episodes.title: Why I Started The Builder's Frequency
episodes.description: The origin story — why I'm building a podcast about creating while employed.

episodes.title: The Invisible Entrepreneur
episodes.description: Building in the margins — the stealth entrepreneur's playbook.

episodes.title: I Built an AI Trading Desk (And You Can Too)
episodes.description: How I built an automated AI trading desk with agents, and you can too.

episodes.title: Eight Employees, Zero Paychecks — Inside the AI Operation That Runs Itself
episodes.description: I have eight AI employees who never sleep, never complain, and cost me about forty dollars a month. I pull the curtain back on the entire AI operation.

episodes.title: Three Signal Flows, Six Agents, One Trading Desk — How the MRE Actually Makes Decisions
episodes.description: Deep dive into the MRE's signal flow architecture: three independent signal flows (Pipeline, Geopolitical, Portfolio) feeding a dynamic daily signal map, with six AI agents each managing $100K portfolios.

episodes.title: The Hole in Every AI — And What I Built to Fill It
episodes.description: Why the most powerful technology humanity has ever built has nothing to say about the most important questions we'll ever ask — and the Faith Journey app I built to fix that.
